title: Decision Points for Today
subtitle: Eight concrete decisions to leave the table with — each card opens the relevant context page.
summary: Eight concrete decisions for today's meeting — package scope, pricing, pre-authorization, channels, reporting, escalation, pilot duration, and success metrics.

items.title: Package Scope
items.summary: Which outpatient scenarios should be included in the pilot?

items.title: Pricing Range
items.summary: Which package pricing scenario should be used as the negotiation baseline?

items.title: Pre-authorization Threshold
items.summary: Which cases require prior approval before treatment? Default proposal: above EUR 250.

items.title: Communication Channel
items.summary: Which email, phone, and assistance channel becomes the operational route?

items.title: Reporting Frequency
items.summary: Same-day case reports — plus weekly digest and monthly performance? Confirmed cadence today.

items.title: Escalation Pathway
items.summary: When should outpatient care move to ER or hospital admission? Confirmed red-flag list.

items.title: Pilot Duration
items.summary: Confirm the proposed three-month pilot, July through September 2026.

items.title: Success Metrics
items.summary: Response time, documentation time, dispute rate, and AG Holder feedback.
